description: Manifest generation via Claude API -- prompt design for generating structured manifest JSON from a topic and duration. Schema conformance (output must pass Zod validation from OBJ-004). Geometry and camera selection logic (mapping topic semantics to appropriate scene geometries and camera paths). Uses SKILL.md geometry reference (OBJ-071) as the knowledge base for the generation prompt.
notes: Tier 4 integration. Medium priority. Split from original OBJ-055. Dep corrected from OBJ-069 to OBJ-071 per Round 4 Issue A.
